---
title : "Perception and Legitimacy of Income Inequality in International Comparison"
date : "2008-08-01"
author : "Castillo, \relax JC; Gerlitz, J. & Schrenker, M."
categories : ["Presentation"]
publication : " . Boston"
publication_short : " . Boston"
abstract : "(Abstract not available)"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
---
---


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

Castillo, \relax JC; Gerlitz, J. & Schrenker, M. (2008). *Perception and Legitimacy of Income Inequality in International Comparison*.  . Boston

:::
